query:
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, gameTime,
  modelAwayScore, modelHomeScore,
  modelAwayPLOdds, modelHomePLOdds,
  modelTotal, modelOverOdds, modelUnderOdds,
  modelAwayML, modelHomeML,
  modelRunAt, publishedModel
FROM games
WHERE sport = 'NHL' AND gameDate = '2026-03-25'
ORDER BY gameTime;
